ratings.comment: More of a conceptual class with less math. Pay attention during lectures and preview the material in the textbook before if you can, it really makes it less confusing and is helpful for the exams. Bahia is really knowledgeable. If you worry less about memorizing the material and applying the concepts to real life this class is really enjoyable.

I probably learned more from the TA's than I did from him as they corrected and wrote the exams and lab reports. He has online lectures which are vital to watch. He has finicky Lecture questions and the class is more memorization than comprehension. The online Materials/quizzes are NOT clearly organized, so check the page regularly.

Lectures are really required discussions since all the lectures are videos online. A quiz is taken in every discussion on the videos before we've even discussed them. You have to watch more videos for lab, and there are online quizzes too. The labs were the high point of this class, actually kind of fun. Lab reports take a long time.

He makes you watch lectures online and uses lectures as a "discussion". Attendance is mandatory because there are quizzes (he drops the lowest 3). The class is terribly organized, he is hard to understand, the TAs have NO CLUE what is going on.
